themes: Bills enter NFL offseason quiet period
writeup: The Buffalo Bills find themselves in the calm before the storm as the 2026 NFL offseason enters its quietest stretch in mid-June. With OTAs and minicamp in the rearview mirror and training camp still weeks away, there is little roster movement or breaking news to report. This lull is a familiar feature of the NFL calendar, giving fans and analysts a moment to reflect on the roster as currently constructed. For the Bills, the relative silence signals a degree of stability and confidence in the direction of the team heading into the summer.

articles.title: The Bills Have Entered the Quietest Portion of the 2026 NFL Season
